name: mqtt-broker-auth-1
body: MQTT broker reprovision may not propagate to the broker's auth store; verify via direct connect probe (the broker reports success but auth lookups still 401 against the stale store).

name: mqtt-broker-auth-2
body: petro_backend overrides the DB-stored MQTT port 1883 -> 443 over WSS at /api/v1/mqtt-ws. Edge devices must use this gateway path; direct broker connections from the public internet are firewalled.

name: mqtt-broker-auth-3
body: Testing approach for MQTT broker auth: connect with paho-mqtt to the canonical URI (port 443 over WSS), supply credentials from the env, expect CONNACK rc=0 within 5s. Failure modes: rc=4 (bad credentials), rc=5 (broker rejected the client id).
